projectDescription: A cross-platform Electron desktop app that lets you instantly publish local folders, files, MBTiles map data, and proxy endpoints over HTTP with zero configuration.
keyFeatures: One-click publishing of local folders, files, MBTiles, and CLT datasets over HTTP
Built-in proxy server for forwarding requests to remote URLs
MBTiles tile server with MapBox and OpenLayers preview support (raster PNG and vector PBF)
Configurable port, IP binding, CORS headers, and gzip compression per task
REST API for programmatic task management
System tray integration, auto-launch on login, and auto-update
Multi-language UI (Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English)
Traffic usage tracking and per-task data limit enforcement
publicApiSurface: GET /getList — returns all active publishing tasks with their URLs
GET /addTask?path=<filepath> — adds a new task from a file or directory path
GET /{taskId}/{z}/{x}/{y}.{format} — MBTiles tile endpoint (PNG / PBF / GeoJSON)
GET /{taskId}/metadata.json — TileJSON metadata for an MBTiles task
GET /{taskId}/map-preview — interactive map preview for an MBTiles task
GET /{taskId}/* — static file or directory serving endpoint
GET /{taskId}/* (proxy) — proxied request forwarding to remote target
